buffers_checkpoint: checkpoint写数据块数量\nbu:
buffers_checkpoint: number of buffers written by checkpoints
buffers_clean: number of buffers written by the bgwriter
buffers_backend: number of buffers written directly by a backend. A high value means the shared buffer is not well tuned and backend processes have to flush to disk themselves
buffers_backend_fsync: number of times a backend had to execute fsync
checkpoint_write_time: 从shared buffer 中w:
checkpoint_write_time: time spent writing from the shared buffer to the page cache
checkpoint_sync_time: time spent by the checkpoint calling fsync to flush dirty data to disk. A long value easily causes IO jitter, so increase checkpoint_timeout or checkpoint_completion_target
postgresql_checkpoints_timed：指超过checkpoi:
postgresql_checkpoints_timed: number of checkpoints triggered after checkpoint_timeout elapsed
postgresql_checkpoints_req: increases when a checkpoint is triggered manually or when the WAL size reaches max_wal_size. If this value is greater than postgresql_checkpoints_timed, checkpoint_timeout is set improperly
returned ,代表执行查询遍历行数\nfetched，代表返回给客户端的行:
returned: number of rows scanned by queries
fetched: number of rows returned to the client
If returned is much greater than fetched, query efficiency is low and full table scans exist, so add indexes to optimize
rollback 过多，则需要检查业务逻辑，表面业务逻辑存在问题: Too many rollbacks means the business logic needs to be checked, as it indicates a problem in the business logic
temp_files较高说明存在很多排序，hash,或者聚合这种操作，可以增大w: A high temp_files value means there are many sort, hash or aggregate operations. Increasing work_mem reduces temporary files and also greatly improves the performance of these operations
与恢复冲突取消的查询次数，只会在备机上发生: Number of queries canceled due to recovery conflicts, which only happens on standby servers
命中率低于99%，就需要适当调大shared buffer: If the hit ratio is below 99%, increase the shared buffer accordingly
数据库中花费在写数据文件的时间，pg中脏页一般写入page cache，如果这个: Time spent writing data files. In PG dirty pages are normally written to the page cache; a high value means the cache is small and the OS cache has to flush more aggressively
数据库中花费在读取文件的时间，这个值很高说明内存较小，需要频繁从磁盘读入数据文件: Time spent reading data files. A high value means memory is insufficient and data files are frequently read from disk

Time spent reading data files. A high value means memory is insufficient and data files are frequently read from disk
Time spent writing data files. In PG dirty pages are normally written to the page cache; a high value means the cache is small and the OS cache has to flush more aggressively
死锁的数量，如果这个值很大说明业务逻辑有问题: Number of deadlocks. A large value indicates a problem in the business logic
